allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment prioritizing common cardiac pathology with emphasis on ischemic disease, cardiomyopathy differentials, and vasculitis recognition

questions.topic: Myocardial infarction: acute vs. chronic changes & dating
questions.education_objective: Recognize acute and chronic MI changes and estimate timing of cardiac injury

questions.topic: Cardiomyopathy differential: dilated vs. hypertrophic vs. restrictive
questions.education_objective: Distinguish between major cardiomyopathy types using morphologic criteria
Recognize atherosclerotic plaque morphology and identify vulnerable plaques

questions.topic: Giant cell arteritis vs. other large vessel vasculitis
questions.education_objective: Recognize giant cell arteritis and distinguish from Takayasu arteritis
Distinguish infectious from non-infectious endocarditis and recognize vegetation types

questions.topic: Myocarditis patterns: lymphocytic vs. giant cell
questions.education_objective: Differentiate lymphocytic from giant cell myocarditis and understand prognosis
Recognize cardiac myxoma morphology and distinguish from thrombus
Identify cardiac amyloidosis and understand diagnostic approach
Recognize morphologic changes of hypertensive heart disease
Distinguish polyarteritis nodosa from ANCA-associated vasculitis patterns
